name: api_integration_express
description: Integrate Inconvo into an Express.js application to provide a 'chat-with-data' endpoint. The user must initialize an Inconvo project, configure a semantic model for a provided PostgreSQL schema, and implement an Express POST endpoint `/api/chat` that uses `@inconvoai/node` to handle natural language queries. The endpoint should support multi-tenant context by passing a `store_id` from the request body to Inconvo. A real PostgreSQL database is provided via `DATABASE_URL`. The task is complete when the endpoint correctly returns data from the database in response to natural language questions, filtered by the provided context.
